title: The Attention Head
author: Zachary Proser
description: How induction heads copy patterns in transformers, and how attention maps, logit attribution, and causal ablation support different strengths of claim.

blueprint.subject: INTERPRETABILITY
blueprint.subtitle: An attention pattern suggests a copying circuit. Attribution measures its contribution. Intervention tests whether the behavior depends on it.
rfiSuggestions: Why can an attention map suggest a mechanism without proving one?
How do previous-token and induction heads compose into a copying circuit?
What result would make an ablation causal evidence rather than a correlation?
